items.claim: Paddy Pimblett has a 44% takedown defense rate.
items.quote: the takedown game uh from Saint Den and the 44% takedown defense probably means that probably means I should go with Saint Den

items.claim: Max Holloway lands nearly seven significant strikes per minute.
items.quote: Holloway nearly seven significant strikes per minute.

items.claim: Conor McGregor lands 5.3 significant strikes per minute.
Conor McGregor has a 66% takedown defense rate.
Max Holloway has an 81% takedown defense rate.
Max Holloway's recent activity level is superior to Conor McGregor's.
items.quote: So, Holloway's still active. McGregor's not. That's got to favor Max Holloway.

items.claim: Conor McGregor will experience fatigue in the later rounds of the fight.
items.quote: I like Holloway to get the win. Probably by finish in the third or fourth round, as McGregor gets tired

items.claim: Cody Duran lands more than one takedown per round.
items.quote: Duran because he lands more than one takedown per round

items.quote: Costa lands less than a takedown every three rounds.
